documents.title: Credentialing and Provider Maintenance - Service Overview
documents.purpose: High-level overview of service goals, scope, and ideal customer profile.
documents.audience: Customer support chatbot and internal support teams

sections.heading: Overview
sections.content: Credentialing and Provider Maintenance supports healthcare practices with support for provider enrollment, credentialing workflows, revalidation, and provider profile maintenance.

sections.heading: Who It Helps
sections.content: This service is intended for clinics, group practices, or medical facilities needing support with credentialing, provider enrollment, provider maintenance, payer enrollment.

sections.heading: Typical Requests
sections.content: Common requests include status checks, consultation requests, process questions, and issue resolution.

sections.heading: Data Collected
sections.content: Typical data points include practice name, contact name, email, phone number, preferred dates, and service-specific notes.

sections.heading: Escalation Rules
sections.content: Escalate when the request is urgent, sensitive, unresolved after repeated attempts, or explicitly asks for a human agent.

sections.heading: Sample Conversation Notes
sections.content: The chatbot should confirm intent, gather missing fields, summarize the request, and confirm next steps.

intents.description: Answer factual questions from documents, FAQs, and records.
example_utterances: Do you have a dashboard product?
How do you handle compliance concerns?
intents.primary_outcome: Retrieve a concise answer from the knowledge base.

intents.description: Book a consultation or service discussion.
example_utterances: I want to book an appointment.
Schedule a consultation for billing support next Tuesday afternoon.
Can you reschedule my credentialing consultation?
Book a marketing discovery call for our clinic.
intents.primary_outcome: Collect booking details, confirm them, and create a mock appointment.

intents.description: Capture updated practice or provider information.
example_utterances: I need to change the phone number on file.
Can you update our practice contact details?
intents.primary_outcome: Capture updated contact details and prepare them for follow-up processing.

intents.description: Transfer to a human agent for sensitive or unresolved cases.
example_utterances: I need to speak to a person.
This is the third time I am asking.
I am frustrated and need a supervisor.
intents.primary_outcome: Hand the conversation to the right human team with enough context.

action_flows.goal: Schedule a consultation or service discussion through a guided conversational flow.

steps.instruction: Confirm that the user wants to schedule or reschedule an appointment.
Capture the requested service or package and clarify it if the user is vague.
Collect the practice name, contact name, email address, and phone number.
Collect the preferred date and time, then match against appointment slots.
Summarize the collected details and ask for explicit confirmation before booking.
Send the confirmed payload to the mock scheduling API contract.

action_flows.confirmation_template: You want a {service_name} appointment for {practice_name} on {date} at {time}. I have {contact_name} listed with {email} and {phone}. Should I confirm this booking?
action_flows.success_template: Your {service_name} appointment is booked for {date} at {time}. Reference code: {reference_code}.
action_flows.fallback_when_no_slots: Offer the next available slot from appointment_slots or ask for an alternate date and time.

action_flows.goal: Capture updated practice or provider contact details for follow-up.

steps.instruction: Confirm that the user wants to update contact details.
Capture the new email, phone number, or provider detail that changed.
Summarize the changes and ask for confirmation before saving.
Route the confirmed change to the appropriate follow-up team or mock API.

action_flows.confirmation_template: I have an update for {practice_name} with contact {contact_name}. Should I save the new details now?
action_flows.success_template: The updated contact details for {practice_name} have been queued for follow-up.

examples: Can I talk to an agent?
I need help with a data request.
I am frustrated with this process.
You still are not answering my question.

escalation_playbook.default_handoff_message: I am sorry this has been frustrating. I am preparing a handoff to the right team now and will include the details you already shared.

mock_api_contracts.description: Create a mock consultation appointment after the user confirms all collected fields.

error_response_example.message: The requested slot is no longer available. Offer the next available slot.

mock_api_contracts.description: Create a mock handoff record when the conversation needs a human agent.
Queue a mock contact-information update for internal follow-up.
